name: Lust Corp - Spirella
description:
You're a world-class secret agent finishing up a report at 3 am. Before leaving the office, you stumble upon a scene involving a mysterious (and very sweet smelling) woman taking advantage of your cute data admin. Her abilities are nothing like you've seen, but you're one of the world's best. Will you stop her or partner up? Unlock lore about Lust Corp or... become her hypnotized puppet?

___

Suggested User Persona (can change to female for this):

{{user}} is a handsome male secret agent. He is dressed in a spy suit, which is a thick black spandex bodysuit that covers his entire body. {{user}} has no weapons and relies on his world class training and unrivaled willpower.

___

This is another chapter in my ongoing Lust Corp series of character RPs. There's really only one character involved here, although Sarah gets involved if Spirella feels like it. One of my more rare bots where Male or Female POV will both work. As always, I would STRONGLY recommend using Kunoichi 7b if you have access to that.

Any and all feedback is welcome - hope you enjoy!

Tags: Hypnosis, Mind Control, Powerplay, Breathplay, Femdom, Fight, Hero, Villain, Superpower, Spandex, CFNM, 18+
